privileged_info_summary: The task is docker_secure_build_secrets@1, targeting a synthetic acme-trading-bot project at /home/ga/projects/acme-trading-bot. The admin user is 'ga' with password 'password123'. A synthetic Artifactory token 'acme_prod_8x92_secure_token_v1' is created in secrets/artifactory_token.txt. The task verifies secure Docker BuildKit secret handling via image tag 'acme-trading-bot:secure'. The passing score threshold is 70 points based on five criteria: secure history (40 pts), build success (20 pts), Dockerfile implementation (15 pts), script implementation (15 pts), and build script usage (10 pts). All project files and tokens are generated by the task setup script and contain no real sensitive data.
